artPrompt: An ornate hero shot of a crude carved wooden totem bristling with splinters, knobbed and worn smooth in places from rubbing, faint ember-orange light glowing from within its grain, planted upright amid scattered coins on scorched ground. A single dramatic firelight rakes across its rough surface while the surrounding feral square sinks into night-black smoke. Rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: Voter Turnout Totem
text:
Voters you control get +0/+1.
{2}{R}, {T}: Create two 1/1 red Voter creature tokens.
Whenever five or more Voters attack, you may roll a six-sided die. On a 4 or higher, draw a card.
flavorText: Rub it for good turnout. Or for splinters. Usually splinters.
